news_items.summary: A nearly 3-hour delay and significant flooding threatened the Friday night matchup, before the game continued around 10:45 p.m. CT.

news_items.headline: Jazz Chisholm Jr.'s go-ahead home run lifts Yankees to 5-3 win over Nationals
news_items.summary: The Yankees had a late lead and the bullpen coughed it up, but Jazz Chisholm Jr.'s go-ahead homer in the ninth pushed New York to a 5-3 win over the Nationals on Friday night in Washington, D.C.

news_items.headline: Angels 4, Twins 3: I break down and cry, balk on by
news_items.summary: A not-so-hot inning for Zebby Matthews has a strange rule/call go against him, and the Twins can’t get key hits later.

news_items.headline: Mets' Brett Baty praised as a 'dog' by Andy Green amid 10-game hitting streak
news_items.summary: In an otherwise listless night at the plate for Andy Green's Mets in their 6-2 loss to the Red Sox, Brett Baty kept it rolling, going 3-for-4 with a solo homer, extending his hitting streak to 10 games.

news_items.headline: Kiké Hernández on why he'll miss Dodgers' White House visit
news_items.summary: Injured Dodgers utility player Kiké Hernández will not be with the team when it visits the White House later this month to celebrate its 2025 title.

news_items.headline: Late Plane, No Problem as Red Sox Soar Past the Mets, 6-2
news_items.summary: Seven in a row, and they barely made it to the ballpark.
